title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (v), FOR THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, PAGE 16, TITLE B, PARAGRAPH a, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2991 / 57 OG No. 6, 1012 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2782, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (v), FOR THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, PAGE 16, TITLE B, PARAGRAPH a, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

v

), for the Province of Batangas, page 16, Title B, paragraph

a

, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Twenty hundred and ninety-three is amended to read as follows:

"(v) Darasa feeder road, Tanauanâ

Construction P10,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
